title: Most reliable English scripts and srt subs for TV series
display_title: Most reliable English scripts and srt subs for TV series
wikitext:
[]: Most reliable English scripts and srt subs for TV series?             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Sat Sep 14, 2013 3:51 pm Hello! I'm an old Eva fan from the late 90s who got sucked up again by the hype of the upcoming (in the country where I live) release of the third Rebuild movie. And, fcuk me, it's great to be back in full Evamania mode! I have had a look at the good Evaotaku.com website and enjoyed the English script of EoE that bochan_bird and the site owner have put together. I was wondering the following: 1 - Is there a similarly reliable and complete script for the TV series? Is it present in a subtitle format? 2 - Are there subs (srt files or somthing like that) made from the EoE script done by bochan_bird and Brendan Jamieson?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 14, 2013 5:31 pm Related http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12123/Best-subtitles-for-Evangelion-TV-series/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12785/The-definitive-set-of-Eva-subs/

[]:             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Sun Sep 15, 2013 3:06 am Thanks. Damn I did have a look at the Search/Threads but using "script", not subs.
